text.tspan: bun run server, bun run dev
one d2 -w per diagram POSTed to
Confirmed on a live session: node server.js, every d2 -w child,
vite and esbuild all share ONE process group (pgid = bun run
start's own pid). Before the fix, nothing ever told a watcher to
stop when the frontend navigated to a different diagram, so each
view leaked one process for the life of the server, and a fast
revisit could orphan the previous process from the tracking Map
before it had actually exited (see stopWatcher in server.js).
